narrative:
Emerald Township has 524 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.4 percentage points.
